name: ImageGen
description: Batch-generate images through your own logged-in ChatGPT, on your normal quota. Real session, images render, auto-named downloads. (1.8.3: crash-hardened — previews are downscaled thumbnails (full-res stays on disk), codex results drain in small batches, no whole-store loads; fixes the 1.8.1 OOM. Activity shows a live Codex lane with how-far progress. Never overwrite — every regenerate writes a new version.)
